title: daemon/api.rs: concurrent wallet pay calls can both pass balance check — over-spend
description: daemon/src/api.rs:229-274 — handle_wallet_pay() reads confirmed balance, checks amount <= balance, then persists a PaymentSession and sends the relay request. Two concurrent POST /api/wallet/pay calls both see the same balance snapshot before either persists a session, so both pass the check. The sessions are both Requested state; when the payee replies with addresses both sessions will attempt actual sends, exceeding the balance. Fix: at minimum document that actual sends are rate-limited by wallet balance at send_payment time, and that Requested sessions without a confirmed send do not reserve balance.
